name: campus-cornerstones-data
title: Campus Cornerstones Data
description: Metadata and data derived from Campus Cornerstones. Initiated in 2024 and currently a work in progress, this site explores the history of the buildings of Iowa State University through historical photographs, maps, and modern GIS data.

resources.name: facets-json
resources.title: Campus Cornerstones Metadata Facets
resources.description: Unique values and counts of metadata facet fields.

resources.name: geodata-json
resources.title: Campus Cornerstones geographic metadata
resources.description: Geojson data containing all objects with lat-longs and associated descriptive metadata.

resources.name: timeline-json
resources.title: Campus Cornerstones timeline metadata
resources.description: Time-based metadata formatted for TimelineJS or other applications.

resources.name: metadata-csv
resources.title: Campus Cornerstones full metadata in csv
resources.description: Complete metadata export for Campus Cornerstones objects.

resources.name: metadata-json
resources.title: Campus Cornerstones full metadata in json
resources.description: Complete metadata export for Campus Cornerstones objects.
